expected_outcome: Knowledgeable Cyber Security professional capable of performing vulnerability assessments, identifying security risks, parsing logs, and understanding offensive and defensive security strategies.

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily practicing Linux commands, configuring virtual networks, and analyzing packet captures in Wireshark.

mini_project.title: Network Packet Analyzer
mini_project.description: Capture local network traffic using Wireshark, analyze handshakes (TCP/TLS), and write a Bash script to parse and extract unique IPs from system logs.

phases.milestone: Strong comprehension of networking protocols, command-line operations, and operating system configurations.

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily setting up encryption tools, verifying checksums, and building user access policies.

mini_project.title: File Integrity Checker
mini_project.description: Develop a Python or Bash tool that hashes files in a directory, monitors changes, and alerts when files are modified, showing cryptographic differences.

phases.milestone: Mastered basic authentication frameworks, threat models, and cryptographic implementations.

topics.name: Information Gathering & Scanning
subtopics: Nmap for Port Scanning & OS Detection

topics.name: System & Web Pentesting
subtopics: OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities (SQL Injection, XSS, CSRF)

phases.practice_schedule: 3 Hours daily running scans, exploiting vulnerabilities in isolated test rigs (e.g. TryHackMe, HackTheBox).

mini_project.title: Vulnerability Assessment Report
mini_project.description: Set up a vulnerable virtual machine, scan it for vulnerabilities, write an exploit proof-of-concept, and author a professional remediation report.

phases.milestone: Familiar with offensive methodology, vulnerability scoring (CVSS), and automated scanning frameworks.

phases.practice_schedule: 2.5 Hours daily analyzing cyber threat logs, configuring local firewall rules, and simulating investigations.

mini_project.title: SIEM Dashboard Setup & Log Analysis
mini_project.description: Set up a centralized log dashboard using Wazuh or Elastic, trigger security events on a client machine, and create alerts for unauthorized access.

phases.milestone: Proficient in security operations, threat hunting, parsing event logs, and reporting containment procedures.

major_projects.title: Enterprise Security Hardening Blueprint
major_projects.description: Conduct a security audit of a simulated web architecture, implement firewall configurations, block OWASP Top 10 attacks using a WAF (ModSecurity), enforce TLS 1.3, and write custom Snort IDS detection rules.

major_projects.title: Digital Forensics & Malware Analysis Report
major_projects.description: Analyze a compromised memory dump and disk image using Volatility and Autopsy to identify the malicious process, determine the entry point, analyze the malware hash characteristics, and map to MITRE ATT&CK techniques.
